name: Prometeo
description: Prometeo — LatAm open banking API platform aggregating bank accounts, account info, and payment initiation across 9 Latin American countries.

seo.title: Prometeo — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Prometeo: Prometeo — LatAm open banking API platform aggregating bank accounts, account info, and payment initiation across 9 Latin American countries.

when_to_use: Fetching bank account data via open banking API across 9 LatAm countries
Initiating account-to-account payments in Latin America
Account verification and balance checks for LatAm fintech apps

pros: Aggregates account info and payment initiation
cons: Open banking regulation still maturing in LatAm
review.verdict: Best option for pan-LatAm open banking data and pay-ins, though regulation and bank stability vary.
review.best_for: LatAm fintechs needing account info and payment initiation across multiple countries
review.not_for: Merchants needing card acceptance or rock-stable, mature open banking rails

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
